sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100645" key="sunqume/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνθῡμ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n100645.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be of one mind</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:208" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">208</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
